news.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Stock Price Highlights: Indian benchmark indices surged on Friday, with Sensex rising 1,695 points and Nifty gaining 461 points, driven by broad-based buying, banking sector strength, and easing crude oil prices following improved global geopolitical sentiment.
